design_philosophy: White and black clean editorial design. Premium AI SaaS aesthetic for a Nepal-focused business. No gradients. High-tension contrast between Old Money Tech Serif (Instrument Serif) and Sterile Body (Geist).

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-none text-primary
scales.h2: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight text-primary

layout_and_spacing.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 lg:gap-8

components.cards: bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-xl shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] p-8 transition-all duration-300 hover:shadow-[0_4px_16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] hover:-translate-y-1

buttons.primary: bg-[#0C0A09] text-white rounded-md px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#1C1917] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#0C0A09] border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-md px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center
buttons.inverse: bg-white text-[#0C0A09] rounded-md px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium hover:bg-[#FAFAFA] transition-colors inline-flex items-center justify-center

components.navbar: fixed top-0 inset-x-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#E7E5E4] h-16 flex items-center transition-all duration-300
components.dark_cta_section: relative bg-[#0C0A09] text-white overflow-hidden py-32 border-t border-[#1C1917]

image_urls.description: Minimalist modern office. Use as a background or hover reveal image for the Corporate/Agency business type card.
Aesthetic boutique store. Use as a background or hover reveal image for the Retail/E-commerce business type card.

sections_instructions.navbar: Sticky, high z-index, frosted glass. 'Nurekha' wordmark in Instrument Serif. Links and CTA on the right. Note: Use pure JS/JSX standards for React.
sections_instructions.hero: Include 'hero_background' CSS dot grid. H1 must use Instrument Serif ('Your business, always online.'). Keep text max-w-3xl. Primary + Secondary CTA buttons. Reveal via framer-motion.
sections_instructions.channel_logos: Horizontal list displaying the 5 channels (Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, TikTok, Website). Use Lucide icons only. Hover state colored by 'social' palette.
sections_instructions.features_grid: 6 cards. 3-column layout. Top-aligned Lucide icon, large Serif heading for the feature, Geist sans for description.
sections_instructions.how_it_works: 4 steps. Number them using big Instrument Serif numerals (e.g., '01', '02') in text-[#E7E5E4].
sections_instructions.business_types: 9 types grid. Dense layout. Subtle hover effects. Option to reveal an image from 'media' on hover for select cards, keeping it minimal and editorial.
sections_instructions.dark_cta: Use dark_cta_section style. 'Ready to automate?' in serif. White inverse button.
sections_instructions.footer: Standard B2B SaaS footer. Link columns. Text in Geist.

animation_and_interaction.rules: Fade-up stagger on lists. Do not animate layout shifts. Smooth spring hovers for cards.

testing_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form elements, clickable cards) MUST contain a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
